commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — 95 strategies in roster (92 active), identical to 2026-05-26 snapshot. No adds, removes, or toggles.

**⚠️ PIPELINE STALLED — operational priority.** `diagnose.json` shows `PIPELINE_STALLED`: no paper or shadow trades in 1,800+ seconds as of 11:03 UTC. The bot is detecting graduations (10,896 total, last 229s ago) and all Level 1–4 checks pass, but every T+30 candidate is being filtered or rejected. Live sell-failure errors were logged at 06:08, 06:40, and 09:40 UTC — suggesting live positions may have been stuck on exit retries. Separately, 54% of the last 50 pools were marked `synthetic_pool`, which could be pushing the effective pass-through rate below entry-gate thresholds. **Recommend the operator check `/api/skips?limit=50` immediately to confirm which filter is blanket-rejecting all candidates.**

**Two strategies are now PROMOTABLE.** `v25-bot-excl-climbing` (score=100) leads the board: n=333, total=+4.632 SOL, `drop_top3`=+2.320 SOL (50% of P&L survives the outlier strip — genuine fat-tail edge, not lottery), monthly=+10.80 SOL/mo, edge_flag=STABLE with a 7-day readiness score of 100/100/100/85/85/100/100. All four promotion gates clear by a wide margin. `v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp` (score=87) also clears all four gates: n=195, total=+3.709 SOL, `drop_top3`=+0.343 SOL, monthly=+14.51 SOL/mo. However, top3 concentration is 91% — the outlier-strip is thin. This is a conditional promote: edge survives the strip, but recommend conservative position sizing until drop3 widens with more n.

**Six INVALID strategies recommend killing.** `v34-bot-excl-climbing-minlift` (n=154, drop3=−1.232), `v33-bot-excl-climbing-ttp5` (n=152, drop3=−1.005), and `v32-bot-excl-climbing-1s` (n=150, drop3=−1.014) are variants of v25 with worse exit configs — P&L evaporates entirely when top 3 wins are stripped. `v10-best-double` (n=140, drop3=−0.605, monthly=+2.19) fails both drop3 and monthly gates. `v14-sumabs-shadow` (n=105, total=−1.849, drop3=−3.331) accumulates losses. `v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro` — the only **live** strategy among the INVALID cohort — has n=126, total=−0.027 SOL with 3 sell failures today; recommend disabling to stop live capital exposure.

**Three shadow strategies are pacing toward the bar.** `v9shadow-velmono-dev` (n=62, drop3=+2.106, monthly=+4.49 SOL/mo) is the strongest: at ~2.4 trades/day it should reach n=100 in ~16 days with both drop3 and monthly well above bar. `v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono` (n=63, drop3=+0.845, monthly=+4.05) and `v9shadow-vel20-top5` (n=75, drop3=+0.374, monthly=+3.88) also pacing. All three STABLE in edge_flag with consistent readiness scores over 7 days.

**Two v35 strategies are pre-emptive kill candidates.** `v35-vel2050-holders10` (n=74, total=−3.352 SOL, monthly=−14.36 SOL) and `v35-vel2050-top10-40` (n=75, total=−2.313 SOL, monthly=−9.91 SOL) haven't hit n=100 but are already deeply negative across all metrics. At ~1 trade/day each, reaching n=100 would require 25+ more days of continued losses. Recommend killing both now.

**Best-combos surface a new testable hypothesis.** `buy_ratio > 0.6 + confirmed_recovery` (n=100, opt_avg_ret=+8.36% at TP75/SL30) is the only leaderboard combo with sufficient sample size and positive opt_avg_ret. `vwap_pullback strict + climbing_t30_t45` (n=56, opt=+14.67%) is promising but needs more data. Recommend launching a shadow test for `buy_ratio>0.6 + confirmed_recovery` as v39.

**Operator's single most important action today:** (1) Investigate and fix the pipeline stall (check skips); (2) Approve the promote of v25-bot-excl-climbing; (3) Approve the INVALID kills to free capacity.

6 enabled strategies have n>=100 and fail drop_top3 gate: v34/v33/v32 climbing variants, v10-best-double, v14-sumabs-shadow, v25-live-micro.
v35-vel2050-holders10 monthly=-14.36 SOL, v35-vel2050-top10-40 monthly=-9.91 SOL. Pre-emptive kill candidates.

patterns.pattern: v32/v33/v34 climbing variants score 50 for 3+ consecutive days — all fail drop_top3 with n>=150. P&L concentrated in 1-3 lottery trades.
v9shadow trio (velmono-dev, velmid-liq-mono, vel20-top5) trending upward in n with positive drop_top3 across 7 days.
Live sell failures repeated 3x today. live-micro strategy continues to bleed. Structural exit-reliability issue on live mode.

action_items.summary: Investigate PIPELINE_STALLED — check /api/skips?limit=50 to find which filter is blanket-rejecting T+30 candidates. Also review 3 live sell failures for exit-retry blockage.
Promote v25-bot-excl-climbing to live — score=100, n=333, drop_top3=+2.320 SOL, monthly=+10.80 SOL/mo. All 4 gates clear with wide margin.
Promote v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp — score=87, n=195, drop_top3=+0.343 SOL (thin). All 4 gates clear. Recommend conservative position size.
Kill v32/v33/v34 climbing variants — n=150-154, all fail drop_top3 gate. Lottery-trade P&L only.
Kill v10-best-double — n=140, drop_top3=-0.605 SOL, monthly=+2.19 SOL/mo. Fails drop3 and monthly gates.
Kill v14-sumabs-shadow — n=105, total=-1.849 SOL. INVALID on all gates.
Disable v25-bot-excl-climbing-live-micro (live capital) — total=-0.027 SOL, 3 sell failures today. INVALID. Pause live exposure.
Pre-emptive kill v35 holders10 (monthly=-14.36 SOL) and v35 top10-40 (monthly=-9.91 SOL) — deeply negative, no recovery signal.
